## Summary

## Linear

- [ ] Feature

## Enterprise Impact

- [ ] Tenant and RBAC impact considered

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm run typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm run lint`
- [ ] `pnpm run test`
- [ ] `pnpm run build`

## Notes

Add rollout, migration, or follow-up notes.
